metadata.title: EdTech Software Development Services
metadata.description: We design and develop education technology solutions that transform how learners, teachers, and organizations connect. From custom e-learning platforms to AI-powered learning apps, our EdTech software development services are designed to meet the growing demand for digital learning experiences.
metadata.ogDescription: We design and develop education technology solutions that transform how learners, teachers, and organizations connect. From custom e-learning platforms to AI-powered learning apps, our EdTech software development services are designed to meet the growing demand for digital learning experiences.
metadata.siteName: AWS Consulting Partner | Gen AI | Product Engineering | Brilworks

hero.headline: Build Your EdTech Platform — Launch in 10-20 Weeks
hero.headlineHtml: Build Your EdTech Platform — Launch in 10-20 Weeks
hero.subheadline: From MVP to enterprise — we build custom LMS, e-learning platforms, and AI-powered education apps. Your EdTech startup development partner for scalable, compliant software.

sections.title: Our EdTech Development Solutions
sections.subtitle: End-to-end education technology solutions — from e-learning platforms to AI-driven adaptive learning systems.

items.title: E-Learning Platform Development
items.description: End-to-end e-learning platforms with online courses, content delivery, video streaming, and student assessments. Built for scale from day one.

items.title: Learning Management System (LMS) Development
items.description: Custom LMS with role-based access, gamification, progress tracking, and attendance management. Simplify training for any organization size.

items.title: Mobile Learning App Development
items.description: Cross-platform iOS & Android apps for on-the-go learning, exam preparation, and micro-courses. React Native & Flutter expertise.

items.title: School & University Management Software
items.description: Automate admissions, scheduling, grading, and teacher-parent-student communication. Replace spreadsheets with a unified platform.

items.title: Virtual Classroom & Video Learning Platforms
items.description: Real-time teaching with video conferencing, whiteboard, screen sharing, and recording. Zoom, Twilio, and custom WebRTC integrations.

items.title: Adaptive & AI-Driven Learning Solutions
items.description: Intelligent systems that analyze learner behavior and personalize content paths. AI-powered assessments, recommendations, and analytics.

items.title: Custom EdTech Platform Development
items.description: Have a unique EdTech idea? We build tailored solutions from MVP to enterprise. Your vision, our engineering — EdTech MVP development in 10-20 weeks.

sections.title: Ready to Build an EdTech App?
sections.description: Get a free consultation and project estimate. We respond within 24 hours.

items.title: EdTech Domain Expertise
items.description: 15+ EdTech platforms built. We understand learner journeys, educator workflows, and compliance (COPPA, FERPA, GDPR).

items.title: Scalable Architecture
items.description: Cloud-native, microservices-based architecture designed for large learner volumes. Auto-scaling from 100 to 1M+ users.

items.title: Data-Driven Design
items.description: Built-in analytics dashboards, learner behavior tracking, and engagement metrics. Data-informed decisions from day one.

items.title: User-First Approach
items.description: UX research with real educators and learners. High adoption rates because we design for how people actually learn.

items.title: Ongoing Support
items.description: Post-launch maintenance, performance optimization, and feature iterations. Your platform grows with your user base.

sections.title: Our Engagement Models
sections.subtitle: Flexible models to match your stage — whether you're a solo founder with an idea or a funded startup scaling fast.

items.title: Dedicated Development Team
items.description: A full team (devs, QA, PM, designer) working exclusively on your product. Best for funded startups building a core platform.

items.title: Team Extension
items.description: Add our engineers to your existing team. They integrate with your processes, tools, and culture. Best for scaling quickly.

items.title: Project-Based Model
items.description: Fixed scope, fixed timeline, fixed price. We handle everything from design to deployment. Best for MVPs and defined projects.

sections.title: How to Launch Your Platform
sections.subtitle: From first conversation to production — in as little as 10 weeks.

items.title: Contact Us
items.description: Fill out the form. We respond within 24 business hours.

items.title: Free Consultation
items.description: We discuss your requirements, target users, and build a roadmap together.

items.title: Proposal & Estimate
items.description: Detailed project proposal with timeline, milestones, and transparent pricing.

items.title: Project Kickoff
items.description: Your dedicated team starts building. Weekly demos, Slack access, full transparency.

items.q: How much does it cost to build an EdTech platform?
items.a: Costs depend on features, design, integrations, and scalability. A small e-learning app might cost less, while a complete learning management system with analytics and AI recommendations will require a higher budget. We share clear estimates after discussing your goals.

items.q: How long does it take to develop an education app?
items.a: Timelines vary by scope, but most projects range between 10 to 20 weeks from concept to launch. We work in agile sprints to deliver faster without compromising quality.

items.q: Can you integrate my app with existing systems?
items.a: Yes. We can connect your new platform to CRMs, ERPs, video tools like Zoom, and payment gateways for seamless operation.

items.q: Do you support both web and mobile platforms?
items.a: Absolutely. We build responsive web platforms and native or cross-platform mobile apps for iOS and Android.
We follow strict data security practices, including encryption, secure APIs, and compliance with international privacy standards to protect learners and institutions.

items.q: Can you help me scale the product later?
items.a: Yes. We build all solutions with scalability in mind so you can easily add new features, courses, or users as your platform grows.

sections.title: Ready to Build Your EdTech Platform?
sections.description: You're one conversation away from turning your EdTech idea into a scalable platform. Tell us what you're building — we'll show you how we can help.
benefits: Free 30-minute consultation with an EdTech specialist
COPPA, FERPA & GDPR compliance built in
